articles.title: Solana Sees Meteoric Growth Against ADA, ETH Even As Founder Cites ‘Curse’ Following Network Outages
articles.description: Solana’s founder concedes that frequent network outages have been its bane over the last 12 months.

articles.title: Binance Boosting BUSD Stablecoin by Ditching USDC and Two Other Major Stablecoins
articles.description: Crypto exchange Binance has announced that it will automatically convert user balances and new deposits of USD Coin (USDC), Pax Dollar (USDP) and TrueUSD (TUSD) to Binance USD (BUSD) at a 1:1 ratio on September 29th. The world’s biggest digital asset exchange by trading volume is rolling out its BUSD “Auto-Conversion” solution in an apparent […]

articles.title: A New Meme Coin Wants Do Kwon Jailed. Enter JailKwon
articles.description: A crypto project has launched a token called JailKwon in honor of Terra's notorious figurehead, Do Kwon. The team behind the project has described it as a meme coin. Months after Terra's spectacular collapse, the crypto community is still after Do Kwon.The latest outfit to hit out at the failed blockchain's leader is a new cryptocurrency project called JailKwon, which went live on BNB Chain on...

articles.title: Solana-based transactions approach 100 million despite challenging 2022
articles.description: The Solana (SOL) network continues to record development as the blockchain strives to take on established platforms like Ethereum (ETH),... Continue reading

articles.title: Circle CEO says Binance decision to stop USDC support is good as it increases utility
articles.description: Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire said Binance’s decision to convert its users’ USD Coin (USDC) holdings to its Binance USD (BUSD)stablecoin is good.

articles.title: Aave Halts ETH Loans As Ethereum Bellatrix Merge Upgrade Goes Lives
articles.description: Aave pauses ETH loans ahead of the merge.

articles.title: Ethereum Rises as the Merge Locks In
articles.description: Ethereum's Beacon Chain has upgraded, successfully completing the first stage to the full Proof of Stake consensus system.

articles.title: Bellatrix upgrade goes live, sets stage for Ethereum’s Merge
articles.description: The Bellatrix upgrade was activated at epoch 144896 on the Beacon Chain and is now live.

articles.title: This Cryptocurrency has Pumped 300% in a Month – Too Late to Buy?
articles.description: Luna classic (LUNC), the native token of the old Terra blockchain, has risen by well over 300% in the past 30 days after entering what looks like a parabolic rally. But with such a massive rally now behind it, is there still time left to buy? As of 10:05 UTC, LUNC is up 302% for the past 30 days, trading at a price of USD 0.000403. Over the past 7 days, the gain is 205%, while a whopping...

articles.title: Ethereum activates Bellatrix upgrade as last step before The Merge
articles.description: Ethereum developers have activated Bellatrix, a key upgrade that will prepare the Beacon Chain for The Merge.

articles.title: Charles Hoskinson calls Ethereum Classic ‘dead project with no purpose’
articles.description: Cardano (ADA) founder Charles Hoskinson said Ethereum Classic (ETC) is a “dead project with no purpose or compelling argument to exist outside of spite.” I love how a sustainable development fund turns into a miner tax.

articles.title: Vitalik reminds node operators to update client before the Bellatrix upgrade
articles.description: The Bellatrix hard-fork is the final update on the Beacon Chain that will prepare it for the Merge, and if node operators are not updated to the latest client, they risk syncing to the pre-fork chain.

articles.title: Binance To Rename All Stablecoin Holdings to BUSD
articles.description: User balances in USDC, USDP and TUSD will be converted into the exchange’s Binance USD stablecoin on Sept. 29

articles.title: Binance Will ‘Auto-Convert’ $USDC, $USDP, $TUSD to $BUSD From September 29
articles.description: On Monday (September 5), Binance announced that it will no longer support the use of fiat-collateralized stablecoins $USDC, $USDP, and $TUSD for trading, and instead “users’ existing balances and new deposits” will automatically get converted to $BUSD at a 1:1 ratio. According to a blog post published on September 5 by the world’s largest crypto […]

articles.title: LG Taps Hedera Blockchain for NFT Marketplace
articles.description: LG is all set to enable TV owners to view and buy NFTs from the couch.
